CustomField.description: The Name value of the corresponding RegulatoryAuthorizationType record in org. NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator queries RegulatoryAuthorizationType WHERE Name = this value to get the Id for nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_permit_type__c lookup. Must match RegulatoryAuthorizationType.Name exactly after deploy and data load.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Exact Name of the matching RegulatoryAuthorizationType record (used by NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator to set the nepa_permit_type__c lookup field).
CustomField.label: RA Type Name
